evals.prompt: I'm adding Playwright e2e tests for a login form. The form has email and password inputs, a Submit button, and a 'Forgot password?' link. I want to use page objects. Can you set up the page object structure and a test that fills the form and clicks Submit?
evals.expected_output: PageObject classes using @RootSelector/@Selector or @SelectorByRole, accessor keyword, createFixtures, typed test using injected fixture

evals.prompt: Refactor this test to use playwright-page-object. [paste a test with raw page.locator() chains]
evals.expected_output: Extracted PageObject classes, createFixtures, test using typed accessors instead of locators

evals.prompt: I have a product list where each row has a name, price, and Add to Cart button. How do I model this with playwright-page-object so I can click Add to Cart on the second item?
evals.expected_output: ListPageObject with @ListSelector, item control with Selector/SelectorByRole, example using items[1] or getItemByIndex(1)
